name: pm-plugin
description: PM delegate workflows for AI-native discovery, research, design routing, planning, backlog grooming, TASK_SPEC creation, Claude handoff, and Developer report sync.

interface.shortDescription: Run discovery-first, research-backed PM workshops and create design-aware Claude-ready handoffs with Codex.
interface.longDescription: PM provides Codex PM delegate workflows for discovery-first, research-backed brainstorm workshops, UI/UX design routing, roadmap ranking, backlog grooming, Developer report sync checks, TASK_SPEC creation, and Claude-ready handoffs.
interface.defaultPrompt: Start a PM brainstorming conversation, investigate the project and external evidence as needed, identify whether Designer routing is required, choose the right workflow with the human, then produce scoped documents, TASK_SPEC candidates, and Claude handoff material.
